title: Canopy Growth (CGC) Q1 Revenue Jumps 9 Percent
text: Canopy Growth Q1 FY2026 revenue showed a 9% jump, significantly outperforming analyst expectations. The company achieved $72.1 million in revenue, compared to analyst expectations of $49.8 million. Canada adult-use cannabis business drove momentum with the company gaining share in high-demand categories. Global medical cannabis business demonstrated steady performance across international operations. The strong Q1 FY2026 results demonstrate progress on the company's transformation strategy toward profitability.
